_comment: This is the example/default config. Copy this file to policy/config/policy.config.json and tune it for your repo. policy.config.json is gitignored and must never be committed.

forbidden_dependencies.reason: Domain must not depend on persistence. It defines pure business rules and entities.
Domain must not depend on HTTP transport. It is framework-agnostic.
Domain must not depend on UI. Presentation concerns are strictly above the domain.
Application services orchestrate business logic and must not depend on UI components.

derived_data_patterns.name: persisted_percent_complete
derived_data_patterns.message: percentComplete appears to be persisted. Completion percentage is a derived field — always compute it, never store it.

derived_data_patterns.name: persisted_completion_percentage
derived_data_patterns.message: completion_percentage is a derived value and must not be stored in the database or state.

derived_data_patterns.name: persisted_aggregate_status
derived_data_patterns.message: aggregateStatus appears to be persisted. Aggregate status must be computed at read time, not stored.

derived_data_patterns.name: persisted_derived_counter
derived_data_patterns.message: Derived counters (taskCount, completedCount, totalTasks) must not be stored. Compute them from source data.
